plang.note: No PLang tests on this branch - eval suite uses builder pipeline, not runtime test runner

findings.issue: New 106-line file with complex validation logic (JSON parsing, step count, index validation) has 0% test coverage
findings.impact: LLM response validation could silently accept malformed responses or reject valid ones. This is the gatekeeper for builder correctness.
findings.suggestion: Write tests: null inputs, step count mismatch, missing indexes, duplicate indexes, empty actions, JsonElement vs dictionary paths

findings.issue: New builder action delegating to Builder.PromoteGroups() has 0% coverage. PromoteGroups logic in DefaultBuilderProvider is also untested.
findings.impact: Group promotion (grouping steps for the builder) could silently produce wrong structure
findings.suggestion: Test PromoteGroups with various step group configurations

findings.issue: New 55-line list.any action with operator evaluation and property extraction has 0% test coverage
findings.impact: list.any could return wrong results for any/all operator+property combinations. ExtractProperty handles dict and JsonElement separately — both paths untested.
findings.suggestion: Test with dict items, JsonElement items, matching/non-matching conditions, missing properties, empty lists

findings.issue: New 50-line list.group action has 0% test coverage
findings.impact: Grouping by key could silently produce wrong groups or lose items
findings.suggestion: Test with dict items, multiple groups, missing key, empty list

findings.issue: New timer module (start.cs + end.cs) has 0% test coverage
findings.impact: Timer could silently fail or produce wrong elapsed times
findings.suggestion: Test timer start/end lifecycle, default vs named timers, scope parameter

findings.issue: cache.store modified to collect __data__ instead of Return — 0% coverage
findings.impact: Cache store could silently fail to cache action results after Return removal
findings.suggestion: Test cache.store with the new __data__ collection path

findings.issue: Query_OnValidateResponse_MaxRetries_ReturnsError fails: expects 'Validation failed after 3 retries' but gets 'File not found: .build/alwaysfails.pr'. The validation goal can't be loaded, so the test hits a different error path than intended.
findings.impact: The actual max-retries-exceeded error message is untested. If the retry counting logic is broken, this test would not catch it.
findings.suggestion: Set up a real .pr file for AlwaysFails goal that returns error, or mock goal resolution to simulate validation failure

findings.issue: Query_ToolCall_LlmRequestsToolAndHandlesError intermittently fails with empty string assertion. Test depends on snapshot data that may not be reliably set up.
findings.impact: Tool call error handling path is flaky — might pass without actually testing the error handling
findings.suggestion: Investigate snapshot setup reliability, ensure the test deterministically produces a non-empty response

findings.issue: UserActor_DuringBuilding_DoesNotPersistAcrossEngineInstances fails intermittently: settings value 'temporary' persists when it shouldn't. Non-deterministic — likely SQLite file not cleaned up between runs.
findings.impact: Builder settings isolation may be broken — build-time settings could leak into runtime
findings.suggestion: Ensure test temp directory is unique and fully cleaned up. Check if SettingsStore uses shared SQLite file.

findings.impact: Reserved keyword changes could silently break variable name validation
findings.suggestion: Add tests for reserved keyword detection

findings.issue: Compare_BooleanValues_MatchTrue only tests true==true. No test for true!=false. Compare_NestedObjects_DeepDiff only checks top-level match=false without inspecting nested diff structure. No test for type-kind mismatch (object vs array).
findings.impact: Boolean comparison operator could be flipped, nested diff structure could be corrupted, and type mismatches could be unreported — all would pass current tests
findings.suggestion: Add: boolean mismatch test, type-kind mismatch test, nested diff structure inspection, case-insensitive field matching test

findings.issue: 14.3% line coverage — most navigation paths untested
findings.impact: JSON string navigation could silently fail for certain access patterns
findings.suggestion: Test GetChild, EnumerateItems, indexing on JSON string values

findings.issue: 40.9% line coverage — cache hit/miss paths partially tested
findings.impact: Cache invalidation or retrieval bugs could cause stale data
findings.suggestion: Test cache hit, miss, expiry, and the __data__ collection change

findings.impact: Low impact — UI tests are inherently harder and may be covered by integration tests
findings.suggestion: Add basic rendering test if feasible

findings.issue: No test for empty object {} vs empty object {}, empty array vs empty array, or array where actual is longer than expected
findings.impact: Edge cases in array/object comparison could silently fail
findings.suggestion: Add empty collection and reverse-length array tests

summary: 2065/2069 C# tests pass (2-4 non-deterministic failures in LLM callback and actor settings tests). Coverage is strong overall (139/145 changed files have data), but 4 critical gaps exist: validateResponse.cs (106 lines, 0%), list.any (55 lines, 0%), list.group (50 lines, 0%), and promoteGroups.cs (0%). The builder validation code is the most concerning — it's the LLM response gatekeeper with zero tests. Two test failures are real bugs: Query_OnValidateResponse_MaxRetries hits a file-not-found instead of testing retry logic, and UserActor_DuringBuilding shows settings leaking across engine instances. Data.Compare tests are decent but missing boolean mismatch, type-kind mismatch, and nested diff structure verification.
